pages.text: Once upon a time, a brave pirate sailed the seven seas in search of adventure.
One stormy night, he found a mysterious map hidden inside an old bottle.

dialogue.text: What's this? A map… but where does it lead?
To treasure, Captain — more than you can imagine!

pages.text: After many days at sea, he arrived at a tiny island covered in palm trees.

dialogue.text: Land ahoy! That's the island on the map!

pages.text: He dug up the treasure and shared every golden coin with his crew. The End.

dialogue.text: Every soul gets an equal share. That's the pirate's code!
Hurrah for Captain Jack! The finest pirate on the seas!
